home.hero.title: Karbon Fiber, CTP ve Cam Elyaf Kompozit Cozumleri
home.hero.subtitle: Karbon fiber, CTP ve cam elyaf tabanli kompozit parcalarda muhendislik, numune dogrulama ve seri uretim planlamasini tek bir B2B proje akisi icinde yonetiyoruz.
home.hero.workflowTitle: Projenize uygun malzeme ve uretim akisi

items.title: Prototip
items.description: Numune, revizyon ve ilk dogrulama asamasi

items.title: Seri Uretim
items.description: Tekrarlanabilir proses, kalite ve termin takibi

items.title: Muhendislik
items.description: Malzeme, katman yapisi ve proses secimi destegi

workflowSteps.title: Teknik gereksinim analizi
workflowSteps.description: Kullanim ortami, olcu, mukavemet, agirlik ve yuzey beklentisini netlestiriyoruz.

workflowSteps.title: Malzeme ve proses secimi
workflowSteps.description: Karbon fiber, CTP veya cam elyaf katmani ile uygun uretim rotasini belirliyoruz.

workflowSteps.title: Numune, teklif ve seri uretim gecisi
workflowSteps.description: Numune dogrulama sonrasinda miktar, termin ve kalite gereksinimlerine gore seri uretim planini netlestiriyoruz.

home.value_props.title: Neden MOE Kompozit?
home.value_props.subtitle: Malzeme secimi, proses disiplini ve proje iletisimini ayni cizgide yoneten uygulama odakli uretim yaklasimi

items.title: Yuksek Kalite
items.description: Yuzey kalitesi, tolerans ve proses tekrar edilebilirligi odakli uretim akisi

items.title: Deneyim
items.description: Kompozit uygulama ihtiyaclarini teknik gereksinim seviyesinde okuyabilen ekip

items.title: Ozel Uretim
items.description: Parca, panel, muhafaza ve tasiyici bilesenlerde proje bazli ozel cozum

items.title: Hizli Teslimat
items.description: Numune, revizyon ve teslim planini basindan netlestiren is akisi

home.hero.title: Carbon Fiber, FRP and Fiberglass Composite Solutions
home.hero.subtitle: We manage engineering alignment, sampling and serial production planning for carbon fiber, FRP and fiberglass-based composite parts within one B2B delivery flow.
home.hero.workflowTitle: Material and production flow aligned with your project

items.title: Prototype
items.description: Sampling, revision rounds and first validation stage

items.title: Serial Production
items.description: Repeatable process control, quality discipline and delivery tracking

items.title: Engineering
items.description: Support for material, layup and process selection

workflowSteps.title: Technical requirement analysis
workflowSteps.description: We define operating conditions, dimensions, strength, weight and surface expectations.

workflowSteps.title: Material and process selection
workflowSteps.description: We choose the right production route with carbon fiber, FRP or fiberglass layup.

workflowSteps.title: Sampling, quotation and serial production handoff
workflowSteps.description: After sample validation, we lock scope, delivery timing and quality expectations for serial production.

home.value_props.title: Why MOE Kompozit?
home.value_props.subtitle: An application-focused manufacturing approach that keeps material selection, process discipline and project communication aligned.

items.title: High Quality
items.description: Production flow focused on surface quality, tolerance control and repeatable processes

items.title: Experience
items.description: A team that reads composite application needs at the technical requirement level

items.title: Custom Production
items.description: Project-specific solutions for parts, panels, enclosures and structural components

items.title: Fast Delivery
items.description: A workflow that clarifies sampling, revisions and delivery planning from the start
